title: fragaria virginiana subsp. platypetala
intro: Fragaria virginiana subsp. platypetala, also known as the wild strawberry, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Fragaria virginiana subsp. platypetala include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, as well as its potential to act as an antimicrobial agent. Fragaria virginiana subsp. platypetala can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
